title: VSPrinter
description: Able to print different scales ships in survival automatically.
body:
# VS Printer

A *survival friendly* 3D printer. Able to print [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) ship at various scales using reasonable resources.

### Limits of printed ships:

- Cannot place blocks unless its a creative ship.
- Blocks won't drop (no infinity resources).
